forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:50am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Possible small hail in the south in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, with possible small hail in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the east. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost south of Hawker. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between minus 1 and 3 above zero with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Areas of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
